variants.title: Filtrec WP870 Special Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WP870. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WP870 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 131.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 94.5 mm, Length: 73.0 mm

variants.title: Hydac 0005 L 003 P Breather Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WP870
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0005 L 003 P Breather Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WP870
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0005 L 003 P Breather Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
